message: fix: guard flush_turn against jq failure to prevent state corruption

files.patch:
@@ -84,7 +84,8 @@ flush_turn() {
   current=$(read_state "$session_id")
   [ -z "$current" ] && return 0
   local updated
-  updated=$(echo "$current" | jq '.turn_number += 1 | .tool_calls = []')
+  updated=$(echo "$current" | jq '.turn_number += 1 | .tool_calls = []') || return 0
+  [ -n "$updated" ] || return 0
   write_state "$session_id" "$updated"
 }
